description: In Hell, Charlie Morningstar pursues her seemingly impossible goal of rehabilitating demons to peacefully reduce overpopulation in her kingdom.

episodes.title: Overture
episodes.desc: Charlie pitches her project to heaven.

episodes.title: Radio Killed the Video Star
episodes.desc: Alastor protects the hotel from Vox.

episodes.title: Scrambled Eggs
episodes.desc: Trust exercises cause chaos among the crew.

episodes.title: Masquerade
episodes.desc: Angel Dust struggles with his double life.

episodes.title: New Pentious
episodes.desc: Sir Pentious adjusts to his new reality.

episodes.title: Storyteller
episodes.desc: Secrets of the past begin to unravel.

episodes.title: Hazbin Hotel: Behind Closed Doors
episodes.desc: The hotel faces new structural challenges.

episodes.title: It's A Deal
episodes.desc: Alastor's bargains come back into play.

episodes.title: Silenced
episodes.desc: An unexpected silence falls over Hell's media.

episodes.title: Scream Rain
episodes.desc: Tensions boil over into an all-out storm.

episodes.title: Weapon of Mass Distraction
episodes.desc: The team scrambles to build a defense.

episodes.title: Curtain Call
episodes.desc: The conclusion to the season's intense arc.
